author: cms-sw
body:
This change should allow to selected env of one tool at runtime e.g. if project has following tools
- pytorch
- pytorch-cuda
- pytorch-rocm

and project selects `pytorch` as `GPU_EXCLUSIVE_TOOLS` then scram will 
- At build time: Select all the tools env as as build time we need env from all tools e.g. alpaka backend of cuda needs pytorch-cuda env and alpaka rocm backend needs pytroch-rocm
- At runtime: Search for available env and then select env for only that selected tool e.g.
  - on a host with nvidia gpu, env from pytorch-cuda will be selected
  - on a host with amg gou, env from pytorch-rocm will be selected
  - on host without nvida/rocm gpus , enf from pytorch (cpu version) will be selected
  - on host with both nvidia and amd gpus: We can only select enf from one tool and in this case pytorch-uda env will be set.

For now the hook `01-gpu-selection` uses `nvidia-smi` or `rocm-smi` to check if nvidia or amd gpus are available or not. We can not use cmssw tools (e.g. `cudaIsEnabled or rocmIsEnabled` ) as when hooks are run then cmssw env is not set.
title: Hook added for selected env single env from selected tools
